It’s not just the crazy policy they want to pass - the Green New Deal, mass amnesty, reparations, etc. What’s worse than the policy is how they are trying to utterly transform the entire American system of governance through the following legislation that they have already introduced or are in the process of doing so:
* Increase the Supreme Court from 9 to 13 Justices
* Give statehood to Washington, D.C., adding two more rabidly left-wing Senators in the Senate (which is the only reason they are pushing D.C. statehood)
* Abolish the Electoral College
* Federalize elections through the Corrupt Politicians Act (a.k.a. H.R. 1/S. 1)

There is literally one tiny, little rule standing in the way of the Democrat Party being able to hold onto power forever, whether or not the American people want them in power.

The filibuster.

If that goes, the dam is broken and the flood begins.

**That is why you must help educate yourself and others about the filibuster – one of the most arcane, boring-sounding ideas around – and take action to protect it.**

This seemingly small thing, the filibuster, is the finger in the hole in the dam. And only you and other patriots can stop the dam from breaking.

Therefore, this is a five alarm, sirens-blaring call for you to sign up to host a viewing party of _Mr. Smith Goes to Washington_ on your own, with members of your household, or with friends and neighbors you invite over.
[SIGN UP TO PROTECT THE FILIBUSTER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTA4LTM0ODQ3ZGFhMGI0ZjRiYzliOWQ3MTE5ZGViNmM2YTY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdGZpbGlidXN0ZXIvP21pZD00MzY1OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=LFCTw4T06J8DrbEA1JZIAg)
After viewing the movie – a much more interesting and fun way to learn about the filibuster and its importance than just reading about it – you (and anyone else you watch it with) will take action to protect the filibuster.

The Democrats cannot be allowed to get rid of the filibuster and fundamentally and radically change the underlying structure of our nation’s government, especially by such a razor thin margin; doing it only with the approval of a very small group of hardcore, left-wing voters. The mass majority of Americans do not want these changes, but the Democrats will force them through anyway.

[Please sign up today and take action to protect the filibuster and protect America!](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTA4LTM0ODQ3ZGFhMGI0ZjRiYzliOWQ3MTE5ZGViNmM2YTY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvcHJvdGVjdGZpbGlidXN0ZXIvP21pZD00MzY1OCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ORVsaBaEBw825QyfWFc97Q)

Never give up the fight!

Jenny Beth Martin

* Stand by our police and uphold respect for law and order
* Protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty

I was there at the table with President Trump confronting our most dangerous adversaries like China and North Korea. When we fought and won big fights on tax cuts, border security, and conservative judges. We endured relentless threats and attacks through it all. In fact, I was the first White House press secretary to require Secret Service protection because of a credible violent threat against me! **But we never lost focus on the most important thing: getting the job done.** That's exactly what we need to do in every state right now. And I plan to do that as Governor. Please, chip in now to support my effort to serve. **[CHIP IN NOW>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57191855:JZaXXXusN:m:1:3206719985:8F387042D653B9BC693F70D319DD66E4:r)** Peter, I believe we will succeed in making a better future, but only if we hold the line against the attacks on our freedom and push forward with fresh ideas under a new generation of leadership. And though my opponents will do everything in their power to destroy me, I will NOT apologize for who I am or who I am fighting for. **I hope you choose to donate before our mid-month deadline:[https://secure.winred.com/sarah-for-governor/action-2227416/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57191855:JZaXXXusN:m:1:3206719985:8F387042D653B9BC693F70D319DD66E4:r)** Thank you for your time, Peter. body:

name: Team Young
subject: SECOND ATTEMPT TO REACH YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
Young Kim was disappointed when she didn't see your response. She asked us to reach out again.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wFMEwT7UW0SVf6vzr0E9XsoC5-2X9wEQs0XZgYBA5w_hW5dM1BfgnjUWgUAiGpueMB_CwWnuokiU-Cn-M4IW4wl7ePKHKwTl2C3zje_6e_dWPNq8FIydhPLU1Hco61xjHXbq3jU45OGMM9pDQ7_4dLg6SRNdNF6KxohQplsdWzoWhO8dXEDNFMZQukFqBphmcecqD6oPFhr2f658UGZ4XNolHv5q9JfbrJ31_9UXZ6zXgzO0k6BwA1jhsOotPqXu6yrJz4PSypXWXgJepfUSBUgCtGcgV79LzgNkEw9Sfbr9NWJAZFU5ObPSkQBva3zYXThUxp8jvY8nqkJZyTNB_Zph7DP-2ZVtLcTKl-UZ-232V-aqNFYIm0rc1rXHLJ_4caVCHWMbeiQHH8JiabWlmQ==&c=DOTwJBMJC2teHMDymLTX47dRqN-qORO-e9VYMMdoBcHzl_JUJ_wfQw==&ch=a-kmz-nMYsG2iliBWCNL5HnHw5e-iWzAJU_5NHCPvyJGeTzXp_A9oQ==)
---
Friend, we reached out a few days ago asking for your guidance in our campaign. Young Kim was looking forward to hearing from you, but was disappointed when she didn't see your response. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Tell Gazelka No Deals with Democrats
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_gazelka_no_deals&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **Discipline begins at home.** We all know that saying. Because it's the truth. If we can't get the supposed pro-freedom party of the Republicans to listen to us, how can we expect to convince the largely anti-freedom Democrats? **Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is Dancing for the Democrats. Just the other day when they said jump, he said, "how high?"** The Democrats are seizing the day with the tragic accidental shooting in Brooklyn Center. Weak Republican Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka is now bending a knee to radical anti-law enforcement leftists to "hear police reform bills." In other words, Gazelka is willing to bend to the left, but not to YOU on passing the [**Never Again Bill**](https://www.action4liberty.com/never_again_bill_the_only_legislation_that_ends_governor_s_unilateral_emergency_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_gazelka_no_deals&n=2) into law that eliminates Walz' Unilateral Emergency Powers for good?
## Who does he work for?!
Why are we even in this position in the first place? Gazelka is actually holding on to a winning hand. Governor Walz can't sign a budget unless the Republican controlled Senate passes it. This is the same budget that will fund the agencies that have been attacking our businesses for over a year now. And Gazelka is cramming all this stuff through while telling us to pound sand! **IMPORTANT: The Legislature is set to adjourn on May 17th, 2021, so we only have a few weeks to do this.** Just this week, Minnesota Senate Republicans pushed through multiple budget bills to give Walz all the money he needs to attack businesses. He's REFUSING to listen to what YOU demand. And he'll continue unless they hear from YOU that you will not stand for it! **This isn't hard. No deals. No compromise. No massive $52 Billion budget until Walz' Emergency powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill passes!** It's maddening to think the Republicans are set to sell out and yet give the Democrats everything they want. It makes me want to pull my hair out. Voters rewarded Senate Republicans with another majority last November. But they won't do it again unless they STAND UP and fight for our rights. Now is NOT the time to cower to Tim Walz and the radical left. Paul Gazelka and Senate Republicans need to do something important here. They must ACT NOW unless we want Walz' Emergency Powers forever. Have you heard that Gazelka is planning on running for Governor? The rumors are true. **He thinks he can spit in your face by not passing the Never Again bill and then prance into the Republican primary and win.** If he thinks for one second he can beat Walz in an election but cower to him on this issue, than he is sadly mistaken. **Let's give him a dose of reality!** Our strategy team JUST APPROVED 55,000 PHONE CALLS over the next couple weeks to hold Senate Republicans accountable. It's time they hear the voice of the people who overwhelmingly want No Budget, No Deals, No Compromise until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the **Never Again Bill** passes. Although, there's no need for those calls if Gazelka pledges to YOU that Republicans will not pass a budget until the Never Again Bill passes. Do me a favor, please reach out to Senator Paul Gazelka and tell him to pledge to do the right thing and not pass a budget until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed.
## Senator Paul Gazelka
## Phone: 651-296-4875
## Email: [sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn](mailto:sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn)
Contact Gazelka immediately and shoot me an email to let me know. After you are done contacting Gazelka, contact your own state senator and DEMAND he or she does not vote to pass a budget UNTIL Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the **Never Again Bill** is passed.
## [FIND MY SENATOR](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_gazelka_no_deals&n=3)
Remember, April 14th, 2020, ONLY 15 HOUSE REPUBLICANS voted with us to End Walz' Emergency Powers and the Senate refused to move the Resolution. It wasn't until late May after the senate adjourned Sen. Gazelka received a primary challenger and then promptly passed the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution weeks later on June 10th, 2020. **The squeaky wheel gets the greese.** Unless we all overwhelm the Republican Senate that we will settle for nothing less, they will SELL US OUT! With YOU making your voice heard, we can end this nightmare once and for all. **Update:** **Our doorknocking team is now busy informing voters in the Detroit Lakes/Moorhead area about how Con Artist Paul Marquart is protecting Walz' Emergency Powers. Thank you everyone for your generous[Support and Help to Build](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?utm_campaign=democrats_attack_you_and_me&utm_medium=email&utm_source=action4liberty&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_gazelka_no_deals&n=4) Action 4 Liberty's field operations!** **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_gazelka_no_deals&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_gazelka_no_deals&n=6).

body:
|
---
| | | Friend,

It's Marco Rubio here and I wanted to follow up on the news from last week.

I was incredibly humbled and proud to have been endorsed by President Trump for re-election. I know it seems like the election is a while away but the battle for the Senate has already started and is proving to be tough.

It is for these exact reasons that we decided to reopen our Founding Member Campaign last week, **but we have only 97 spots left.
**

---

I know that with the Trump Endorsement, I will be seeing more attacks from the Democrats. A pro-abortion group announced I've been put "on notice" almost immediately after the endorsement. Whether it be online, in the media, or even sending Kamala Harris to Florida, Democrats have already started laying the groundwork to defeat me.

This is what I am facing, Friend.

While it won't be easy, I am not going to bend to the whims of cancel culture and the woke liberal media. I believe that with Trump's Endorsement, my campaign is stronger, but it will energize the Democrats, too.

With all of that being said, I wanted to personally thank you for being one of my top supporters and ask if you would consider becoming a Founding Member of my campaign. I need more people like you, Friend, on my team. Your support makes my team that much stronger in the face of attacks by the Democrats.

We don't have an easy road ahead, Friend, but I know that I can do this with you on my team. Please join today, we only have a few spots left, and this will be one of the last times we make this offer.

Thank you,

Marco Rubio

| During the last presidential campaign the Mississippi Freedom Caucus warned of the coming assault on the Constitution by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. We warned voters that if elected and allowed to serve as President and Vice-President of the United States, Biden and Harris would launch an attack on our rights like never seen before. Now, just four months into their four year term, Joe Biden has left no doubt as to his disdain for our Constitution or his desire to limit the rights and freedoms of every citizen. In a single statement, Joe Biden proved his disregard for the U.S. Constitution earlier this month when he said, “**No amendment to the Constitution is absolute.”** Does the president mean our freedom of religion is not absolute? Will the federal government under his rule decide how, or if, we can even worship? What about our right to peaceably assemble? If that right is not absolute, will government approval be necessary for us to meet with like-minded individuals? Will we be ultimately required to allow government monitors into our meetings to ensure nothing is said that violates Joe and Kamala’s rules? What does he actually mean when he says our rights are not absolute? What about our right to “Keep and Bear Arms?” If “shall not be infringed” is not absolute, can Joe and his band of robber-barons decide it doesn’t exist? Is our rights judged only by his desires on what he deems reasonable? If Kamala can define an assault weapon and then forcibly take it, what else can she decide we shouldn’t own? How much force is she allowed to use in removing that object from our possession? Can she use records of gun sales from our local sporting goods stores as a cause to search homes? If our rights are not absolute, are we even free at all? During this year’s legislative session, the Mississippi Freedom Caucus proposed that Mississippi declare ourselves a Sanctuary for the Bill of Rights. Unfortunately the Republican leadership was more concerned with keeping democrats happy, and deemed a simple statement supporting the Bill of Rights as “controversial”, and as result refused to take a stand. Now just days after the Mississippi legislature adjourned, Joe Biden declares his direct assault on our Bill of Rights. The inaction of the Mississippi legislature is proof that the citizens of Mississippi cannot depend on politicians to defend their rights. Sadly it is just further proof that elected officials will put their personal gain above the rights and freedoms of the people. **It is time the people take direct action.** Today we ask you to join members of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus in declaring Mississippi a Bill of Rights Sanctuary. Join us and thousands of your fellow citizens, as we claim our God-given rights to be absolute and complete. We will defend our rights and freedoms. We will fight every attempt to limit and destroy our freedoms, and we will hold any elected official who refuses to stand for our Bill of Rights accountable. Become a part of the resistance by sending a letter to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, informing them that we will not allow any erosion of our rights and freedoms. Our rights are absolute, inalienable, and complete. We the citizens of Mississippi will stand, will fight, and we will never give up the freedoms on which our nation was founded. These rights and freedoms are ABSOLUTE! ♦ Amendment 1-Freedom of Religion, Speech, and the Press ♦ Amendment 2-The Right to Bear Arms ♦ Amendment 3-Protection from the Housing of Soldiers ♦ Amendment 4-Protection from Unreasonable Searches and Seizures ♦ Amendment 5-Protection of Rights to Life, Liberty, and Property ♦ Amendment 6-Rights of Accused Persons in Criminal Cases ♦ Amendment 7-Rights in Civil Cases ♦ Amendment 8-Excessive Bail, Fines, and Punishments Forbidden ♦ Amendment 9-Other Rights Kept by the People ♦ Amendment 10-Undelegated Powers Kept by the States and the People
